name: Value Prop Tree + Careerspan Funnel Logic

value_prop_tree.description: Finalized value prop tree with opening hooks, Careerspan pitch, CTA, transition language, and objection handling for all 5 career stages. Added soft close protocol, timing rules, cross-stage objection master list, and fallback for ambiguous stages.

system_prompt_update.description: Updated Value Prop Tree section with stage-specific positioning table (opening hooks + pitches). Updated Careerspan Positioning section with DO/DON'T timing rules, soft close protocol, and objection handling. Removed old generic pitch table.

tool_handler_update.description: Replaced generic careerspan_hint string with structured careerspan_recommendation object containing: offering (name), opening_hook, pitch, transition_phrase, key_stat, and booking_link — all stage-specific. Enables the AI model to deliver personalized Careerspan positioning during calls.

decisions.decision: Replaced flat careerspan_hint string with structured careerspan_recommendation object
decisions.rationale: Structured data gives the AI model more control over which element to use when — opening hook for rapport-building moments, pitch for the sell moment, transition_phrase for natural bridge, key_stat for credibility.

decisions.decision: Added soft close protocol as separate section from main value prop tree
decisions.rationale: Soft close is a universal end-of-call behavior independent of stage assessment. Separating it from stage-specific pitches prevents double-pitching (timing rule: skip if pitch already delivered).

decisions.decision: Added cross-stage objection master list in addition to per-stage objections
decisions.rationale: Some objections (cost, sales pitch suspicion, AI vs coaching) occur regardless of stage. Master list prevents repetitive per-stage entries while stage-specific objections handle targeted pushback.

notes: Manual drop — voice-sensitive, Careerspan funnel logic requires judgment. All transition language reviewed for V's voice: direct, non-salesy, honest. Objection handling follows V's 'unmuzzled' philosophy: acknowledge, don't pressure, leave the door open. D5.1 depends on this drop.
